properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My sheep know My voice, And the path that I take, They follow wherever I go; My sheep know My voice And come at My call, But a stranger’s voice do they not know.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My sheep know My voice, And day by day, They abide in the fold, And go not astray; They love Me because I have made them My choice, And they follow My call, For My sheep know My voice.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My sheep know My voice, And the pastures of green, Where I lead them so often to feed; My sheep know My voice, And the cool sparkling stream, Where beside its still waters I lead.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My sheep know My voice, And the valley of death, Thru which I shall lead them some day; But no danger nor harm Can touch one of them, For I will be with them always.
